subcodes.first_line: The Forerunner hath proclaimed: "Verily, the Self-Subsisting shall come with truth, and when He ariseth, the people shall arise for the Lord of all the worlds." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قال القائم ان القیوم یاتی بالحق و انه اذا قام یقوم الناس لرب العالمین انه
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment
